These are the default controls for Cubyz
{| class="wikitable"
|+Keyboard
!Control
!Key
|-
|Forward
|W
|-
|Left
|A
|-
|Backward
|S
|-
|Right
|D
|-
|Sprint
|Left control
|-
|Jump
|Space
|-
|Crouch
|Left shift
|-
|Fly
|F
|-
|Ghost
|G
|-
|Hyperspeed
|H
|-
|Fall
|Left shift
|-
|place
|Right mouse
|-
|break
|Left mouse
|-
|Pick block
|Middle mouse
|-
|Drop
|Q
|-
|TakeBackgroundImage
|prt sc
|-
|FullScreen
|F11
|-
|Escape
|Escape
|-
|Inventory
|E
|-
|Creative inventory
|C
|-
|Chat
|T
|-
|Command
|/
|-
|MainGuiButton
|Left mouse
|-
|SecondaryGuiButton
|Right mouse
|-
|TextCursorLeft
|Left
|-
|TextCursorRight
|Right
|-
|TextCursorDown
|Down
|-
|TextCursorUp
|Up
|-
|TextGotoStart
|Home
|-
|TextGotoEnd
|End
|-
|TextDeleteLeft
|Backspace
|-
|TextDeleteRight
|Delete
|-
|TextSelectAll
|A
|-
|TextCopy
|C
|-
|TextPaste
|V
|-
|TextCut
|X
|-
|TextNewLine
|Enter
|-
|Hotbar 1
|1
|-
|Hotbar 2
|2
|-
|Hotbar 3
|3
|-
|Hotbar 4
|4
|-
|Hotbar 5
|5
|-
|Hotbar 6
|6
|-
|Hotbar 7
|7
|-
|Hotbar 8
|8
|-
|Hotbar 9
|9
|-
|Hotbar 10
|0
|-
|Hotbar 11
| -
|-
|Hotbar 12
|=
|-
|HideMenu
|F1
|-
|HideDisplayItem
|F2
|-
|DebugOverlay
|F3
|-
|performanceOverlay
|F4
|-
|GpuOverlay
|F5
|-
|NetworkOverlay
|F6
|-
|advancednetOverlay
|F7
|}
